description_long: This potted plant features a fantastical, icy blue coloration with large, pointed leaves and dramatic, crystalline structures extending upward and outward from the center. The plant's foliage is broad and layered, with several curling, ribbon-like stems and four prominent, pinwheel-shaped appendages that resemble stylized flowers or propellers. The pot itself is round and smooth, colored in a neutral gray and white, and appears to be made of a solid, matte material. The plant's overall design is highly stylized, with sharp, angular forms and a frosted, almost magical appearance. A small, rectangular tag or label is attached to the front of the pot, suggesting it may be for identification or care instructions. The visual impression is of a decorative, eye-catching plant suited for display in modern or themed urban environments.
description: A striking, icy blue potted plant with crystalline leaves, curling stems, and pinwheel-like appendages in a smooth, round pot with a visible label. The design is highly stylized and decorative, evoking a magical or fantasy theme.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical, crystalline leaf structures, two large pinwheel-like appendages, and the plant label attached to the pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curling, ribbon-like stems and the layered arrangement of the leaves, with one pinwheel appendage visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the crystalline structures and the full spread of the leaves, with all four pinwheel appendages visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the dense foliage and the dynamic, twisting stems, with the pot's smooth surface partially visible.
